title: Ainsworthia carmeli
taxonomy: Ainsworthia carmeli is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It belongs to the genus Ainsworthia, which is a small genus of annual plants. The species is native to the Middle East and North Africa. Ainsworthia carmeli is closely related to other species within the Brassicaceae family, which includes plants commonly known as mustards and cabbages. As a member of this family, Ainsworthia carmeli shares similar characteristics with other Brassicaceae species.
